title: NIMHANS Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Clinician Scientist (Assistant Professor) Posts
description: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Clinician Scientist (Assistant Professor) Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MD/MS can apply for the NIMHANS Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education det...
